title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery pop-up when headset or charge case battery is below 5%, and pop-up reappears if unplugged during update flow
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset or charge case is connected.
3. Verify the headset or charge case battery level is below 5% (e.g., by checking the battery indicator on the Home screen or Device Settings screen).
4. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Locate and tap the Firmware Update (DFU) option.
7. Plug the charge case into a power source (USB cable connected to power).
8. Attempt the firmware update again by tapping the Firmware Update option.
10. While the update flow is in progress, unplug the charge case from power (ensuring battery remains below 5%).
expected: 1. The app displays a pop-up message: "Update currently not available, please try back later" when attempting to update with battery below 5%. 2. After plugging the charge case into power, the firmware update proceeds normally. 3. If the device is unplugged during the update flow while still below 5%, the pop-up reappears and blocks the update.
